fallback_mode: protocol simulation, replay, and fault injection without hardware

test: if [ ! -d .venv ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -e '.[dev]' && pytest
smoke: if [ ! -d .venv ]; then python3 -m venv .venv; fi && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -e '.[dev]' && python scripts/replay_demo.py

next_phase: expand replay, transport abstraction, and dashboard tooling as the active Week 4 project
